title: [Skyship, Living Corridor]
description: A long corridor stretches into the distance.  The air is stale and hot, and the smell of sweat and body odor are pervasive.  Chalk and wax-drawn pale white runes accent the bulkheads, lit by lanterns suspended from the ceiling that sway with the ship's movement.  Small alcoves ae sectioned off by thin wooden walls along the corridor's length, each fitted with a rope netting bed and with room enough for one large individual to stand.
